ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the expense occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the expense occurred */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the expense occurred */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type associated with the expense */,
  "expense_price" REAL /* Price of the expense */,
  "expense_category" TEXT /* Category of the expense */,
  "expense_description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the sale occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the sale occurred */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the sale occurred */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type associated with the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the sale */,
  "sale_description" TEXT /* Description of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_info" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the trend occurred */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the trend occurred */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type associated with the trend */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly, Yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the trend occurred */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the trend occurred */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type associated with the trend */,
  "expense_price" REAL /* Price of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly, Yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_trends_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
